audit.feature: Create a new Workflow from an image

findings.title: Complete Absence of Authentication on All API Endpoints
findings.recommendation: Implement JWT auth middleware on all /api/* routes

findings.title: Complete Absence of Authorization / Access Control
findings.recommendation: Implement RBAC middleware for approve/reject/dispatch actions

findings.title: Unauthenticated Intake Webhooks Without Signature Verification
findings.recommendation: Implement HMAC signature verification for webhooks

findings.title: Backend Workflow CRUD Routes Not Implemented
findings.recommendation: Implement /api/workflows CRUD routes and register in app.ts

findings.title: Frontend Routes Missing from App.tsx
findings.recommendation: Add /workflows and /workflows/new routes to App.tsx

findings.title: No CORS Configuration
findings.recommendation: Add CORS with origin whitelist

findings.title: No Rate Limiting
findings.recommendation: Add express-rate-limit middleware

findings.title: Unbounded Pagination Limit
findings.recommendation: Cap limit to 100, validate page parameter

findings.title: IDOR on All Work Item Endpoints
findings.recommendation: Add ownership/team-membership checks when auth is implemented

findings.title: Unsafe Object.assign in Store Update Allows Field Injection
findings.recommendation: Add field whitelist in store updateWorkItem

findings.title: Duplicated Types in Frontend Hooks
findings.recommendation: Import from @shared/types/workflow instead of local declarations

findings.title: Prometheus Metrics for Workflow Definitions Missing
findings.recommendation: Add workflow_definitions_created_total counter and workflow_definitions_active gauge

findings.title: Router/Assessment Services Don't Read From Workflow Definition
findings.recommendation: Refactor to load routing rules and assessment config from workflow entity

findings.title: Default Workflow Not Seeded at App Startup
findings.recommendation: Call seedDefaultWorkflow() during app initialization

findings.title: Unbounded Response Payload on GET /api/dashboard/queue
findings.recommendation: Add pagination per queue group or return summaries only

findings.title: Unbounded Collection + Sort in GET /api/dashboard/activity
findings.recommendation: Maintain separate sorted activity log or use partial sort

findings.title: Unbounded List Response on GET /api/workflows
findings.recommendation: Add pagination matching PaginatedResponse pattern

findings.title: Frontend API Client Reads body.message but Backend Sends body.error
findings.recommendation: Change body.message to body.error in API client

findings.title: No Graceful Shutdown Handlers (SIGTERM/SIGINT)
findings.recommendation: Add process.on('SIGTERM') and process.on('SIGINT') handlers

findings.title: No unhandledRejection/uncaughtException Process Handlers
findings.recommendation: Add process-level error handlers with structured logging

findings.title: Complete Data Loss on Backend Restart (In-Memory Stores)
findings.recommendation: Add file-based or database persistence

findings.title: No Explicit Body Size Limit on express.json()
findings.recommendation: Set express.json({ limit: '100kb' }) explicitly

findings.title: No Try/Catch in Work Item CRUD Route Handlers
findings.recommendation: Add try/catch with contextual error logging

findings.title: No Try/Catch in Intake Webhook Route Handlers
findings.recommendation: Add try/catch with webhook source logging
